name: time-mission-website
description: Static marketing website for Time Mission.

scripts.check: npm run check:locations && npm run check:sitemap && npm run check:components && npm run check:booking && npm run check:a11y && npm run check:links && npm run check:routes && npm run check:site-data && npm run check:location-routes && npm run check:fallback && npm run check:component-usage && npm run check:analytics && npm run check:seo-catalog && npm run check:seo-robots
scripts.verify:phase7: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:routes -- --dist && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:ticket-panel-parity && npm run check:ticket-panel-source-parity && npm run check:seo-output && npm run check:schema-output && npm run check:sitemap-output && npm run check:robots-ai && npm run check:llms-txt && npm run check:nap-parity && npm run test:smoke

scripts.verify:phase2: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist
scripts.verify:phase3: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist
scripts.verify:phase4: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist && npm run check:ticket-panel-parity && npm run check:ticket-panel-source-parity
